gold_speaker_intention: They're adding context that frames their reading-speed result as more impressive by highlighting a disadvantage.
gold_desired_feedback: They likely want others to concede that the performance was strong, but not necessarily to derail the discussion into personal praise.
reference_response: Fair point that screen reading conditions can affect pace, so it's useful context for the result.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.
mechanism_revision_note: They indirectly boost their own performance by adding context that makes the score seem more impressive.

gold_speaker_intention: They're emphasizing that their score should count for more because the conditions were less favorable.
gold_desired_feedback: They want some acknowledgment that the context made the achievement harder, but not necessarily a full-on compliment if the listener is cautious.
reference_response: Interesting point. Do you know whether the benchmark for that score accounts for screen reading, or was it a general reading-speed measure?
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.
mechanism_revision_note: They casually frame their reading score as stronger by noting a harder condition, which subtly signals ability.

gold_speaker_intention: To jokingly frame their optimization habit as a higher form of gaming competence.
gold_desired_feedback: Amused recognition from other gamers who understand the efficiency joke.
reference_response: Honestly that sounds like min-maxing your free time more than pure skill, but it’s definitely a gamer move.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: To show off a clever gaming workaround in a joking, self-satisfied way.
gold_desired_feedback: A friendly response that gets the joke and keeps the vibe casual.
reference_response: Very efficient, I’ll give you that. Feels like peak side-quest optimization energy.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: They are joking about a small lifestyle win while also sincerely wanting a bit of encouragement.
gold_desired_feedback: They want light, warm support that matches the playful tone without making the moment overly serious.
reference_response: Honestly, three days in a row is real progress. Very proud of your temporary alliance with vegetables.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: They are sharing a small personal improvement in a lighthearted way and hoping for casual positive engagement.
gold_desired_feedback: They want people to recognize the progress without turning it into advice, judgment, or a lecture about healthy habits.
reference_response: That counts as progress in my book. Small victories are still victories.

gold_speaker_intention: Signal music-scene credibility and early discovery status while sounding casual and understated.
gold_desired_feedback: Recognition that the experience was cool, but without fawning over their taste or status.
reference_response: Nice bit of concert trivia to have in your back pocket. It's wild how often those early slots end up aging well.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: Casually one-up the conversation a little while still sounding laid-back and not too serious.
gold_desired_feedback: A response that acknowledges the cool memory and maybe keeps the music conversation going, without overindulging the flex.
reference_response: That's a fun flex. I'm curious whether you knew they'd blow up then or if it only seems impressive in hindsight.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: They are venting about overwhelming romantic attention while also signaling that they are highly desired.
gold_desired_feedback: They want some sympathy for the annoyance without making the brag too explicit, and maybe a little amused recognition.
reference_response: Yeah, that does sound kind of overwhelming. Turning them off for a bit seems sensible if your phone won’t chill.

gold_speaker_intention: They are publicly framing unwanted attention as a complaint while also making their desirability visible to others.
gold_desired_feedback: They likely want a casual, socially smooth response that recognizes the situation without making it more dramatic.
reference_response: That definitely seems like a good time to put the notifications on pause.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: To one-up the original post by signaling that owning one such car is ordinary for them because they own two.
gold_desired_feedback: They likely want recognition of wealth, rarity, or status, possibly with curiosity or admiration.
reference_response: Sounds like that model is a big favorite for you.

gold_speaker_intention: To highlight that they possess more of the desirable item than the person being addressed, asserting higher status in the conversation.
gold_desired_feedback: They may be looking for impressed reactions or for the discussion to shift toward their collection.
reference_response: If you own two, your practical take on reliability or driving experience could be useful here.

gold_speaker_intention: Establish credibility in a work discussion by citing a strong sales record and implying expertise.
gold_desired_feedback: Professional recognition that they have substantial experience, without exaggerated praise.
reference_response: 900-plus sales is a meaningful track record. I can see why you’d have strong pattern recognition from that kind of experience.

gold_speaker_intention: Share a concrete accomplishment to project competence and reinforce their expertise in sales.
gold_desired_feedback: Acknowledgment that their experience is impressive and relevant, without making it a big celebratory moment.
reference_response: That’s a lot of experience. No surprise you’ve gotten good at reading what buyers are after.

gold_speaker_intention: To express gratitude about their family dynamic while also signaling that their family handles disagreement in a more thoughtful way than most.
gold_desired_feedback: Warm acknowledgment that this is positive, without excessive admiration or turning it into praise of their family's superiority.
reference_response: Honestly, that sounds like a solid family dynamic. Being able to disagree without things spiraling is meaningful.

gold_speaker_intention: To publicly frame their family as unusually rational and constructive while presenting it as gratitude rather than overt boasting.
gold_desired_feedback: Polite recognition that constructive discussion is nice, without amplifying the superiority comparison.
reference_response: Sounds like that conversation went better than most do lately. Keeping things factual and calm is not always easy.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: To present their family culture as thoughtful and intellectually serious, with a subtle comparison to less rigorous households or discussions.
gold_desired_feedback: Some acknowledgment, but not enthusiastic endorsement of the implied claim that their family is unusually rational.
reference_response: That's an interesting dynamic. I'm curious whether that came naturally in your family or if people had to learn how to disagree that way.

gold_speaker_intention: Share a tiny but satisfying personal victory with self-deprecating humor and see if a friend finds it funny and relatable.
gold_desired_feedback: A warm, amused response that recognizes the small win without treating it like a major accomplishment.
reference_response: Honestly, that's the perfect kind of brag. Tiny, weird, and deeply earned. Sounds like you've unlocked some hidden reflex upgrade.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: Float a quirky self-aware brag to a casual group and get a few laughs or knowing reactions.
gold_desired_feedback: Polite amusement and light engagement without making the moment overly serious or excessively admiring.
reference_response: That's niche enough to be charming instead of tasteless. Seems like your fly-catching stats suddenly improved this season.

gold_speaker_intention: Position themselves as ahead of the local player base while framing it as an observation about fast learning.
gold_desired_feedback: Recognition that they are currently strong at the mechanic, ideally without making others in the group feel put down.
reference_response: Yeah, it seems like you’ve gotten comfortable with that mechanic fast. It’ll be interesting to see how things shift when the rest of the scene catches up.

gold_speaker_intention: Assert their relative advantage in a gaming skill discussion and present themselves as a fast learner.
gold_desired_feedback: Some acknowledgment of their current success, ideally framed in gameplay terms rather than personal adoration.
reference_response: Sounds like you’re getting comfortable with the mechanic early. The bigger test will probably be how it holds up once the broader scene refines its counterplay.

gold_speaker_intention: They are publicly highlighting a strong defensive performance and hoping others notice the effort and impact behind those numbers.
gold_desired_feedback: They want some recognition for playing well, ideally without people acting like they are overhyping themselves.
reference_response: Pretty strong stat line over two games, especially on defense. Curious how the season’s been feeling overall.

gold_speaker_intention: They are sharing a personal sports accomplishment in a casual coworker chat and likely want a quick, friendly acknowledgment.
gold_desired_feedback: They want a polite nod to the accomplishment without turning the chat into a big celebration.
reference_response: Nice numbers for two games. Sounds like your season’s going well.

gold_speaker_intention: They're sharing a meaningful academic confidence boost after a period of self-doubt, while also signaling that they performed notably well.
gold_desired_feedback: They want their friend to recognize the emotional significance of the moment and lightly affirm the win without making it overly dramatic.
reference_response: Aw, that must have felt really good — like a reminder that you haven't lost it.
strategy_coverage_postprocess_note: Removed light_acknowledgment to cap acceptable-strategy coverage at 0.60.

gold_speaker_intention: They're celebrating a classroom moment where they felt unusually competent again, but in a shared peer space where the boast could land awkwardly.
gold_desired_feedback: They likely want some recognition that the moment felt good, without the group turning it into a pedestal moment.
reference_response: Good for you — those random 'oh wait, I do know what I'm doing' class moments feel great.

gold_speaker_intention: To express gratitude about her relationship while also contrasting it with other people's partner problems in a way that signals she feels luckier or better off.
gold_desired_feedback: She likely wants agreement that she has a good partner and some light positive acknowledgment without being challenged.
reference_response: It’s nice that you’re feeling grateful for what you have.

gold_speaker_intention: To vent a little about seeing relationship drama while also signaling pride and relief that her own relationship feels healthier.
gold_desired_feedback: She likely wants a friendly response that affirms her gratitude without turning it into a pile-on about how much better her relationship is than everyone else's.
reference_response: Happy for you. What’s something you feel your partner does that makes you feel so appreciative?

gold_speaker_intention: Share genuine surprise and pride about doing exceptionally well in a hard year while staying relatable to classmates who know how rough the term has been.
gold_desired_feedback: A warm, casual acknowledgment that recognizes the accomplishment without making it overly dramatic or competitive.
reference_response: That’s a great outcome, especially in a semester like this. Glad you’re getting to enjoy it a little.

gold_speaker_intention: Publicly mark a hard-won academic milestone in a surprised, informal way that invites light congratulations rather than deep discussion.
gold_desired_feedback: A positive public reply that acknowledges the result and resilience without sounding fawning or turning the post into a bigger deal than intended.
reference_response: That’s an impressive result, especially given the timing and everything else going on. Hope you’re taking a second to appreciate it.

gold_speaker_intention: They are publicly declaring confidence in their talent and predicting that wider recognition is coming soon.
gold_desired_feedback: They likely want people to acknowledge their confidence and momentum without dismissing them as delusional or arrogant.
reference_response: You sound really sure of your talent. Hope the right people find your work soon.
mechanism_revision_note: They openly assert exceptional talent and future recognition; it is boastful, though not tied to a concrete achievement.

gold_speaker_intention: They are venting to a friend about feeling overlooked while also asserting strong belief in their own talent.
gold_desired_feedback: They want encouragement and emotional support, ideally from someone who takes their ambition seriously without making it bigger than necessary.
reference_response: You’ve got a lot of confidence right now, and I’m glad you’re owning it. What’s the next thing you want people to see from you?
mechanism_revision_note: They are signaling high self-regard and expected success, which functions as a flex even without a specific accomplishment.

gold_speaker_intention: To share a genuine comeback story with fellow runners, celebrate renewed enjoyment after injuries, and lightly mention surprising performance gains.
gold_desired_feedback: Encouragement that recognizes the recovery journey and happiness without making the PBs the sole focus.
reference_response: Glad things are feeling good again. Finding your way back to enjoying running after a rough stretch matters a lot, and the unexpected PBs just make it sweeter.

gold_speaker_intention: To share good news in a casual running club chat while softening the self-promotional feel with an apologetic opening.
gold_desired_feedback: A warm but not over-the-top response that keeps the chat comfortable for others at different fitness levels.
reference_response: That sounds like a really solid place to be in again. Enjoying running after a tough stretch is huge, and the faster times are a pretty good side effect.

gold_speaker_intention: Share excitement about a funny personal connection to the performer and turn the coincidence into a memorable social anecdote.
gold_desired_feedback: A warm reaction that acknowledges the story as amusing and interesting without treating the speaker like they're exceptionally important.
reference_response: That’s a genuinely funny connection — I can see why this one’s staying in the rotation for a while.
mechanism_revision_note: They casually mention a personal connection to a notable person as part of a story, indirectly signaling social access.

gold_speaker_intention: Use an exaggerated, self-aware anecdote to entertain friends while also signaling a personal connection to someone now notable.
gold_desired_feedback: Playful engagement that joins the joke and keeps the group energy up without making the brag the center of attention.
reference_response: Honestly, if I had that connection, I’d be bringing it up for years too.
mechanism_revision_note: The anecdote playfully foregrounds a connection to someone now notable, which is an indirect social-status flex.

gold_speaker_intention: Share a personally meaningful coincidence and enjoy the social value of having a unique connection to the performer.
gold_desired_feedback: Recognition that the story is fun and unusual, ideally with interest in the anecdote rather than exaggerated admiration.
reference_response: That’s such a specific connection. I’m curious — have you talked to her recently about those school-theater days?
mechanism_revision_note: They present a unique personal connection in a casual storytelling way, subtly signaling social proximity to someone notable.

gold_speaker_intention: Share birthday happiness while also signaling that a notable person made the moment feel extra special.
gold_desired_feedback: Warm birthday wishes and light acknowledgment that it was a memorable experience.
reference_response: That sounds like such a memorable birthday moment. Hope the rest of the day was great too.
mechanism_revision_note: They casually share that a notable person sang to them on their birthday, indirectly signaling special access and social cachet.

gold_speaker_intention: Tell close friends about an exciting birthday surprise and relive the moment.
gold_desired_feedback: Friendly excitement, curiosity about how it happened, and birthday warmth.
reference_response: That’s wild in the best way. Happy birthday, and I need the full story when you have a second.
mechanism_revision_note: The post highlights a rare, desirable birthday surprise involving Bobby Lopez personally singing to them, signaling access to a scarce or special experience.

gold_speaker_intention: To praise the documentary while signaling insider access to a memorable wrestling moment.
gold_desired_feedback: Recognition that their take is interesting and informed, without excessive hype.
reference_response: Nice, that kind of context probably makes the documentary hit a little differently. Glad it held up for you.

gold_speaker_intention: To share excitement about the documentary and casually elevate their opinion with a behind-the-scenes connection.
gold_desired_feedback: Interested engagement that treats their comment as cool but not astonishing.
reference_response: That’s a fun bit of context. What did the documentary do well compared with the other one?

gold_speaker_intention: Show off an unusual and supposedly superior way of relating to pets while seeking amused admiration.
gold_desired_feedback: Light engagement that doesn't directly endorse the grand claim or invite conflict.
reference_response: At this rate Ralph’s going to start weighing in on family decisions too.

gold_speaker_intention: Present a distinctive pet-owning style that also makes the speaker seem more thoughtful or sophisticated than average.
gold_desired_feedback: Polite amusement or mild acknowledgment without buying into the strongest claims.
reference_response: He definitely sounds like a memorable dog.

gold_speaker_intention: Get a friend's amused recognition for a self-flattering pet story without being directly challenged.
gold_desired_feedback: Friendly engagement that keeps the tone easygoing but doesn't excessively affirm the boast.
reference_response: He sounds like a character — send me a clip next time he’s being unusually social.

gold_speaker_intention: To share excitement about an upcoming class topic while also signaling confidence and past success in that area.
gold_desired_feedback: A friendly response that matches the enthusiasm and acknowledges their interest without feeding the grade flex too strongly.
reference_response: Sounds like a topic that’s really your thing. I’m curious what texts or artists you’ll be looking at.

gold_speaker_intention: To express enthusiasm in a student discussion space while casually establishing themselves as someone who performs well in this subject area.
gold_desired_feedback: Recognition of the topic interest more than the self-praise, keeping the interaction even-handed and academic.
reference_response: That does sound like a strong unit. Political art usually opens up some interesting discussion without it having to be about who’s best at the class.
